requirement_topic.en: VINLEC / the energy-portfolio ministry Grid-Connection Settings — 230/400 V, 50 Hz, IEC 62116 Anti-Islanding, and IEC 61727 Interface Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: VINLEC / 能源主管部委并网参数——230/400 V、50 Hz、IEC 62116防孤岛及IEC 61727接口证据
requirement_topic.zht: VINLEC / 能源主管部委併網參數——230/400 V、50 Hz、IEC 62116防孤島及IEC 61727介面證據

summary.en: Saint Vincent and the Grenadines public electricity supply is operated by VINLEC and regulated by the the energy-portfolio ministry. Grid-tied solar PV inverters should be configured for the Saint Vincent and the Grenadines 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply system and for VINLEC project-specific protection settings. The frequency is the same 50 Hz frequency commonly used in China, but the voltage differs: Saint Vincent and the Grenadines uses 230/400 V while China commonly uses 220/380 V under GB/T 156. For utility-interconnected PV inverters, project documentation should include IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, plus documented country-code or custom firmware settings for voltage, frequency, trip thresholds, reconnection delay, and export-control functions.
summary.zh: 圣文森特和格林纳丁斯公共电力供应由VINLEC运营，并受能源主管部委（能源主管部委）监管。并网太阳能光伏逆变器应配置为圣文森特和格林纳丁斯230/400 V、50 Hz供电体系，并符合VINLEC项目特定保护整定。频率与中国常用50 Hz相同，但电压不同：圣文森特和格林纳丁斯使用230/400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156通常使用220/380 V。对于公用电网互联光伏逆变器，项目文件应包括IEC 62116防孤岛证据和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据，并记录电压、频率、跳闸阈值、重连延迟和防逆流功能的国家代码或自定义固件设置。
summary.zht: 聖文森特和格林納丁斯公共電力供應由VINLEC運營，並受能源主管部委（能源主管部委）監管。併網太陽能光伏逆變器應配置為聖文森特和格林納丁斯230/400 V、50 Hz供電體系，並符合VINLEC項目特定保護整定。頻率與中國常用50 Hz相同，但電壓不同：聖文森特和格林納丁斯使用230/400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156通常使用220/380 V。對於公用電網互聯光伏逆變器，項目文件應包括IEC 62116防孤島證據和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據，並記錄電壓、頻率、跳閘閾值、重連延遲和防逆流功能的國家代碼或自定義韌體設置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
VINLEC interconnection and project commissioning conditions — confirm project-specific voltage, protection, metering, and export-control settings
the energy-portfolio ministry electricity-sector regulation context for Saint Vincent and the Grenadines utility projects

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, and domestic anti-islanding reports. These documents are usually prepared for China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid conditions and Chinese grid-operator protection settings. They do not automatically prove suitability for Saint Vincent and the Grenadines 230/400 V, 50 Hz VINLEC network. Even where frequency is the same, voltage thresholds, reconnection timing, ride-through behaviour, neutral/earthing assumptions, and export-control settings must be reviewed for the Saint Vincent and the Grenadines installation.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021及国内防孤岛报告。这些文件通常针对中国220/380 V、50 Hz电网条件和中国电网运营商保护整定编制，不能自动证明适用于圣文森特和格林纳丁斯230/400 V、50 Hz VINLEC网络。即使频率相同，电压阈值、重连时间、穿越行为、中性线/接地假设和防逆流设置也必须针对圣文森特和格林纳丁斯安装进行审查。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021及國內防孤島報告。這些文件通常針對中國220/380 V、50 Hz電網條件和中國電網運營商保護整定編制，不能自動證明適用於聖文森特和格林納丁斯230/400 V、50 Hz VINLEC網路。即使頻率相同，電壓閾值、重連時間、穿越行為、中性線/接地假設和防逆流設置也必須針對聖文森特和格林納丁斯安裝進行審查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages; China 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline)

gap.en: Gap: China grid certificates do not establish VINLEC acceptance. Exporters should obtain the VINLEC project connection conditions, set the inverter profile for Saint Vincent and the Grenadines 230/400 V at 50 Hz, document anti-islanding thresholds, voltage and frequency trip points, reconnection delay, ride-through limits, and export-control settings, and ensure IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence covers the supplied firmware profile. Do not state that Saint Vincent and the Grenadines voltage matches China; only the 50 Hz frequency matches.
gap.zh: 差距：中国并网证书不能构成VINLEC接受依据。出口商应取得VINLEC项目接入条件，将逆变器配置为圣文森特和格林纳丁斯230/400 V、50 Hz，记录防孤岛阈值、电压和频率跳闸点、重连延迟、穿越限值及防逆流设置，并确保IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据覆盖所供应固件配置。不得声称圣文森特和格林纳丁斯电压与中国相同；仅50 Hz频率相同。
gap.zht: 差距：中國併網證書不能構成VINLEC接受依據。出口商應取得VINLEC項目接入條件，將逆變器配置為聖文森特和格林納丁斯230/400 V、50 Hz，記錄防孤島閾值、電壓和頻率跳閘點、重連延遲、穿越限值及防逆流設置，並確保IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據覆蓋所供應韌體配置。不得聲稱聖文森特和格林納丁斯電壓與中國相同；僅50 Hz頻率相同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for any grid-tied solar PV installation accepted by VINLEC or reviewed under Ministry-overseen utility conditions; exact settings are project-specific gates
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid-review needs but is not transferable to VINLEC acceptance without Saint Vincent and the Grenadines configuration review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Saint Vincent and the Grenadines grid settings as 230/400 V at 50 Hz, not China 220/380 V. Reconfigure and document the inverter profile for VINLEC project conditions and obtain IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence covering that profile. Confirm current the energy-portfolio ministry and VINLEC requirements before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将圣文森特和格林纳丁斯并网参数视为230/400 V、50 Hz，而非中国220/380 V。须按VINLEC项目条件重新配置并记录逆变器配置，并取得覆盖该配置的IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据。出货或调试前请确认当前能源主管部委和VINLEC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將聖文森特和格林納丁斯併網參數視為230/400 V、50 Hz，而非中國220/380 V。須按VINLEC項目條件重新配置並記錄逆變器配置，並取得覆蓋該配置的IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據。出貨或調試前請確認當前能源主管部委和VINLEC要求。
